No Poverty.reason: The course focuses on visual communication design skills and theory, with no explicit or implicit connection to poverty eradication or related targets.

Zero Hunger.reason: The course content is entirely focused on visual communication design and lacks any connection to hunger, food security, or agricultural practices.

Good Health and Well-being.reason: The syllabus does not contain any elements related to health, well-being, disease prevention, or access to healthcare services.

Quality Education.reason: As a university course, it directly provides quality tertiary education (Target 4.3). It also explicitly teaches relevant technical and vocational skills, including AI tools and design software, for future employment (Target 4.4).

Gender Equality.reason: The course syllabus does not contain any specific content, objectives, or competencies related to promoting gender equality or addressing gender disparities.

Clean Water and Sanitation.reason: The course focuses on visual communication design and has no discernible connection to clean water, sanitation, or water resource management.

Affordable and Clean Energy.reason: The syllabus does not include any content or objectives related to affordable and clean energy or energy efficiency.

Decent Work and Economic Growth.reason: The course cultivates creativity and innovation (Target 8.3) through practical design projects and AI tools, enhancing students' skills for productive employment and entrepreneurship in the creative economy (Target 8.2).
